bulletPoints: Software engineer with experience in building applications end-to-end.
One of the lead developers for OregonFlora, the open source botany research platform for Oregon State University. It is used statewide for information on conservation of plant diversity.

AI projects developed: a multi-agent AI system to help me with job search (JobbedIn), an AI-powered knowledge database to organize my research papers (Papersy). Leveraged Claude Code, Cursor, OpenCode.
Embrace challenges as opportunities for discoveries.
app.personalSummary: I am a software engineer with multiple years of experience working on B2B and open source platforms. Currently I am one of the lead developers for OregonFlora, an open source botany research platform for Oregon State University. It is used statewide for information on conservation of plant diversity. I leverage Claude Code, Cursor, OpenCode to work on my app, and I enjoy building a fully working solution and owning a problem. I see every challenge as a chance to discover something new.
